name: Spicy Rice and Lentils
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh green chilli (seeded and finely chopped)
1 cup Long grain rice (soaked for 1 hour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 25 minutes + 1 hour standing
2. Cooking time: 25 minutes
3. Drain the brown lentils and cover with boiling water. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes until they begin to soften.
4. In a separate pan, cook the onion over medium heat until soft and lightly colored. Add garlic, ginger, and green chilli, and continue cooking for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add cinnamon, cloves, bay leaf, and turmeric to the pan. Cook for an additional minute, stirring.
6. Drain the cooked rice and lentils (if using separate pots), then add them to the onion mixture. Stir well to combine.
7. Pour in water to cover the ingredients by 3 cm. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until all liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes.
8. Stir in chopped spring onions before serving. Discard the cinnamon stick.
